lint.command: npx eslint --max-warnings=0 src/components/review/ReviewPanel.vue src/components/review/ReviewPanel.test.ts src/components/tools/AnnotationPanel.vue src/components/tools/AnnotationPanel.test.ts src/components/review/TaskReviewDetail.vue src/components/review/TaskReviewDetail.test.ts src/api/reviewApi.ts src/composables/useReviewStore.ts src/components/review/sections/ConfirmedRecordsSection.vue

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update validator/reviewer skill instructions to reference the tracked `debug_scripts/review_demo_seed.py` entry point instead of the ignored `scripts/` location.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both `m6-demo-seed-pack` and `m6-seed-discoverability-hardening` handoffs call out that the tracked seed utility lives in `debug_scripts/` and that older guidance still points workers at the ignored `scripts/` path.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that `commands.test:m6-scoped` is the required mission baseline for M6 review/annotation workers, or provide a `commands.test` alias in `.factory/services.yaml`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `m6-reviewer-direct-launch-shell` handoff reports worker instructions referencing `commands.test` even though this mission manifest uses `test:m6-scoped` for milestone validation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Requester/approver discoverability mismatch from early seed hardening runs.
rejectedObservations.reason: superseded by later milestone state; current probe `GET /api/review/tasks?requester_id=designer_001&limit=1&offset=0` now returns the seeded loop fixture instead of an empty task list.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated `ReviewPanel` viewer-ready warnings during passing tests.
rejectedObservations.reason: already known follow-up with dedicated feature `followup-reviewpanel-viewer-ready-test-harness`; not a blocker for this milestone scrutiny pass.
